title: Cultural review package and terminology safety
summary: Prepare the M7 cultural review package for folk-horror expression, fictionalization boundaries and Chinese/English terminology before public-facing materials are drafted.
acceptance: Reviews folk-horror and zhiguai expression, fictionalization, sensitive-topic handling and Chinese/English terminology used by M7-facing materials
Ensures public-facing material does not present fictional content as real folklore, historical fact, religious claim, medical claim or legal claim
Records unresolved cultural risks, terminology bans or owner gates for downstream material drafts
Adds or updates a citable cultural review document for WM-0106 and WM-0108
Does not approve store publication, public release or final legal/privacy/store claims

history.details: Created by WM-0098 M7 planning DAG; remains proposed until WM-0098 is verified, integrated and done.

Added M7 cultural review package and public-facing terminology checklist for downstream WM-0106/WM-0108 use; recorded fictionalization rules, sensitive-topic gates, blocked claims, owner/external-review gates and missing legacy product brief path; no runtime, release, store, telemetry, save-commitment or M8 work; required checks passed.

verified: No blocking findings; cultural and terminology acceptance confirmed, Roadmap/Web/Windows boundaries preserved, and release/legal/privacy/save/service/M8 gates remain owner-blocked. Required review gates passed; quality subchecks pass via corepack pnpm 11.8.0, while plain pnpm is a local 11.7.0 shim.

Integrated verified M7 cultural review package after independent reviewer found no blocking issues. Integration gates passed: validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check and pnpm quality via pinned Node pnpm.

objective: Create a reviewed cultural and terminology safety package before any M7 public-facing material draft is treated as ready.
forbiddenPaths: packages/** unless only generated content validation references are updated with review
store submission or public release upload
final legal privacy medical religious or historical claims
telemetry accounts paid services crash upload or public feedback system
M8 task creation, promotion, claim, implementation or review
risksAndFileOwnership: Risk: public copy can overstate cultural authenticity; require explicit fictionalization boundaries.
Risk: terminology work becomes final legal approval; keep unresolved items as owner-gated.
File ownership is limited to world, content-balance, design and M7 cultural-review reports.
ownerGate: Block if external cultural/legal review is required and absent
Block if any material makes final legal, religious, historical or medical claims
Block on public release, store submission, signing, telemetry, accounts, paid services or M8 work
benchmarkImpact: None expected; documentation and terminology review only.
reviewRouting: gameplay-designer completes to reviewer; reviewer verifies cultural boundaries, terminology risk recording and downstream dependencies.
rollbackModel: Revert WM-0101 docs and reports; block downstream public material tasks until replacement review exists.

sparkEligibility.reason: Cultural review and terminology safety are product-risk decisions, not a narrow mechanical implementation.

review.summary: No blocking findings; cultural and terminology acceptance confirmed, Roadmap/Web/Windows boundaries preserved, and release/legal/privacy/save/service/M8 gates remain owner-blocked. Required review gates passed; quality subchecks pass via corepack pnpm 11.8.0, while plain pnpm is a local 11.7.0 shim.

integration.summary: Integrated verified M7 cultural review package after independent reviewer found no blocking issues. Integration gates passed: validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check and pnpm quality via pinned Node pnpm.
